title: Can you spot which committed file explains this mismatch?
summary: Google for Developers presents a package management puzzle where local development and CI install the same dependency but end up with different versions despite identical package.json files. The video walkthrough challenges viewers to identify which committed file explains the mismatch by analyzing how the install is being resolved.
